paragraphs: Colorado’s Rivian PPF & Ceramic Coating Experts
Protect and Elevate Your Rivian in Colorado
Google Rating
Based on 106 Reviews
Yelp Rating
Based on 2 Reviews
Facebook Rating
Based on 170 Reviews

At Front Range Detail Studio in Englewood, CO, we specialize in preserving the beauty, performance, and value of your Rivian. Whether you own a the adventure-ready R1T or the innovative R1S SUV., our dedicated team offers precision paint protection film (PPF), ceramic coatings, and ceramic window tint services—all designed for Colorado’s demanding driving conditions.
We’re not just protecting paint — we’re protecting your investment.
We apply premium, self-healing clear film designed to shield your Rivian’s paint from rock chips, scratches, road debris, and environmental damage without compromising gloss or clarity.
Each install uses precision-cut patterns tailored to your Rivian’s exact body lines, from aggressive M bumpers to aerodynamic side skirts.
Safeguards against magnesium chloride, gravel, UV exposure, and road grime.

SunTek Reaction PPF — Our premium clear, high-gloss PPF featuring hydrophobic ceramic-infused technology and a 12-year warranty. Delivers maximum clarity, self-healing properties, and long-term protection without altering your factory paint color.

PURE PPF Color Changing Film — A high-performance color-change PPF available in satin, matte, gloss, and bold custom finishes. Restyle your Rivian while protecting your original paint underneath, backed by a 12-year warranty.
Rivian’s Best Defense
Our exclusive Front Range Package is engineered for Colorado’s unique road hazards. It combines:

Designed specifically for luxury performance vehicles like Rivians, this package is the best way to protect against chips, scratches, UV damage, and road chemicals—while enhancing gloss, depth, and ease of maintenance.
Get a Custom Rivian Paint Protection Quote
Ready to safeguard and elevate your Rivian? Request a custom quote today and tell us what you need. Which services you’re interested in:
Our team will review your request and get back to you promptly with an expert recommendation and quote tailored for your car and driving habits in Colorado.
Locks in a deep, glass-like shine and makes water, dust, and grime bead off effortlessly.
Prevents oxidation and environmental damage, especially critical in Colorado’s high-altitude sun.
Boosts the durability and appearance of your paint protection film.
Whether you drive a the adventure-ready R1T or the innovative R1S SUV., ceramic coating preserves your Rivian’s finish and value.
Blocks up to 99% of UV rays and dramatically reduces interior heat, keeping your cabin cooler and protecting sensitive materials like leather and carbon trim.
Clean, precision-installed tint enhances your Rivian’s aggressive styling.
Our ceramic films are 100% compatible with Rivian’s blind-spot monitors, heads-up displays, and cameras.
Most modern Rivians have a softer clear coat, especially M models. PPF and ceramic are highly recommended.
PPF can mask minor flaws, but we always perform paint correction for a flawless finish first.
Yes, we do custom installs for all special BMW trim and aftermarket parts.

Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I’m very happy with the results.
Geri P.

Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I’ve ever used…

We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat…it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process…
Cindy T.
Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!
Alyson W.

I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won’t be disappointed.
Steve E.

On Point!!!Communication, Quality, Customer Service…All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn’t need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.

My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn’t tet to up sell me, they actually told me what I wanted was going to take more long term, cost more, and become a maintenance issue.  My clear coat had scratches, swirls, bubbles, and many other blemishes.

We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.
Dean P.
Colorado’s Rivian PPF & Ceramic Coating Experts

At Front Range Detail Studio in Englewood, CO, we specialize in preserving the beauty, performance, and value of your Rivian. Whether you own a sharp M3, a bold X7, or a cutting-edge i4, our dedicated team offers precision paint protection film (PPF), ceramic coatings, and ceramic window tint services—all designed for Colorado’s demanding driving conditions.
We’re not just protecting paint we’re protecting your investment.

We recently completed a full Front Range Package on a G80 M3 — featuring a Matte paint protection film using SunTek PPF , completely transforming the car’s appearance while shielding it from rock chips and road debris. We followed up with a lifetime warranty ceramic coating on all painted surfaces, glass, and wheels, then finished it off with full ceramic window tint for heat rejection and UV protection.
The result? A bold, head-turning, chip-resistant, and maintenance-friendly Rivian built to thrive on Colorado roads and look flawless doing it.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car’s paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With self-healing technology and a ceramic coating layer applied over the film, our PPF service is the clear choice to protect your investment in South Denver, Colorado

Our clients have one thing in common: they love their vehicle. From the Class A motorhome to the two-door convertible, our team of detail specialists are equipped and experienced to handle all detailing needs anywhere in Metro Denver.
Over 15 years experience in the automotive detailing industry. Car, Trucks, Semi Trucks, SUVs, RVs, Boats & Watercraft.

Our clients have one thing in common: they love their vehicle. From the Class A motorhome to the two-door convertible, our team of detail specialists are equipped and experienced to handle all detailing needs anywhere in Metro Denver.
12559 E Broncos Pkwy, Centennial, CO 80112
